merged_events.event_description: Diplomatic relations and the American Legation in Jordan were established when Wells Stabler presented his credentials as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim at Amman.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations and the American Legation in Jordan were established on February 18, 1949 when Wells Stabler presented his credentials as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim at Amman.

merged_events.event_description: U.S. Legation in Jordan elevated to Embassy when Joseph Coy Green was promoted from Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary and presented credentials.

evidence.quote: Joseph Coy Green, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1952-05-14. Credentials presented: 1952-07-31. Promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary 1952-09-23.

matched.notes: Perfect match. Both CSV and RDCR agree on 1949-02-18 as the date diplomatic relations and the American Legation were established.

Dates and statuses match. RDCR does not provide a separate institutional elevation date, so POCOM's promotion date of 1952-09-23 is used per source priority rules. CSV note references the Chiefs of Mission page, consistent with POCOM sourcing.
